generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance LightingDimmerActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Embedded actuator for adjusting lighting levels in the building infrastructure, controlled via BIM-enriched device metadata for tenant-specific configurations"
]

instance HVACActuator : DTDFVocab:Actuator [
    base:desc "HVAC control actuator for temperature/humidity regulation, integrated with BIM for spatial-aware commissioning"
]

instance OccupancyControlActuator : DTDFVocab:Actuator [
    base:desc "Actuator that automatically adjusts lighting/HVAC based on real-time occupancy data from post-occupancy sensors"
]

// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance OccupancyDetector : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Post-occupancy occupancy sensor detecting human presence in rooms, feeding data to DT via Ditto middleware"
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyDataStream
]

instance EnvironmentalSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Multi-parametric environmental sensor (temperature, humidity, CO₂) embedded in BIM models for real-time monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnvironmentalMetricsStream
]

instance LightingLevelSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Lighting level sensor measuring ambient illumination in each room, synchronized with BIM device metadata"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LightingIntensityStream
]

instance EnergyConsumptionSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Energy consumption meter tracking power usage per tenant/zone, integrated with BIM endpoint addresses"
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnergyUsageMetrics
]

// C4: Data Transmission Components
instance OccupancyDataStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancyDetector
]

instance EnvironmentalMetricsStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EnvironmentalSensor
]

instance LightingIntensityStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LightingLevelSensor
]

instance EnergyUsageMetrics : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EnergyConsumptionSensor
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance BuildingBIMModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "3D spatial and functional BIM representation of the Living Lab facility containing all building components (rooms, lighting fixtures, HVAC systems)"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo BIMEnrichmentTool, ModelDrivenTransformationTool
]

instance DeviceMetadataStream : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Extracted BIM metadata containing tenant IDs, endpoint addresses, and control logic for all physical devices"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo HonoConfigurationTool
]

instance RealTimeOperationalData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Aggregated real-time operational data (occupancy patterns, energy metrics, environmental conditions) fed into DT for analysis"
    DTDFVocab:fromData OccupancyDataStream, EnvironmentalMetricsStream, LightingIntensityStream, EnergyUsageMetrics
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PredictiveOptimizationService
]

// C11: Enablers
instance BIMEnrichmentTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Autodesk Revit or similar BIM tool for device modeling and control logic definition, ensuring semantic enrichment for runtime compatibility"
    DTDFVocab:enables ModelDrivenTransformationTool
]

instance ModelDrivenTransformationTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Driven Engineering framework automating BIM-to-runtime artifact conversion (Hono/Ditto configurations) via MDE principles"
    DTDFVocab:enables HonoConfigurationTool, UnrealEngineVisualization
]

instance HonoConfigurationTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono middleware for real-time data exchange and bidirectional communication between physical devices and DT"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveOptimizationService
]

instance UnrealEngineVisualization : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Immersive visualization platform (Unreal Engine 5) for DT dashboards and interactive monitoring of building operations"
    DTDFVocab:enables ImmersiveVisualizationService
]

instance CustomAnalyticsPlugin : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Standardized extension point for domain-specific plugins (IoT analytics, AI-driven maintenance alerts) via BOREALIS framework"
    DTDFVocab:enables CustomServiceIntegration
]

// C6: Services
instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Facility manager dashboard providing real-time visualization of operational metrics (energy consumption, occupancy patterns) via Unreal Engine integration"
    DTDFVocab:provides FacilityDashboardInsights, ImmersiveVisualizationOutput
]

instance PredictiveOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Reinforcement learning-based energy optimization system (BOREALIS project) for adaptive lighting/HVAC control policies"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyOptimizationRecommendations, ControlPolicyUpdates
]

instance CustomServiceIntegration : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Modular service integration framework allowing deployment of domain-specific plugins (IoT analytics, AI maintenance alerts)"
    DTDFVocab:provides IoTAggregationService, MaintenanceAlertSystem
]

instance ImmersiveVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "3D interactive visualization of the Digital Twin environment for immersive monitoring and control"
    DTDFVocab:provides SpatialOccupancyVisualization, ControlInterface
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance FacilityDashboardInsights : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Aggregated operational metrics displayed in facility management dashboards (energy consumption trends, occupancy heatmaps, environmental conditions)"
]

instance EnergyOptimizationRecommendations : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time recommendations for energy-saving adjustments (lighting dimming, HVAC optimization) derived from predictive analytics"
]

instance ControlPolicyUpdates : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated updates to building control policies (lighting schedules, HVAC setpoints) triggered by reinforcement learning models"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance IoTAggregationService : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Centralized IoT data aggregation system processing sensor streams for unified DT analysis"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance MaintenanceAlertSystem : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "AI-driven maintenance alerts triggered by anomaly detection in sensor data (e.g., unexpected energy spikes, equipment failures)"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance SpatialOccupancyVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "3D spatial representation of real-time occupancy patterns within the building environment"
]

instance ControlInterface : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Interactive control panel for facility managers to adjust building systems via DT visualization"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

// C17: Environment and Components
instance BuildingInfrastructureEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains LightingDimmerActuator, HVACActuator, OccupancyControlActuator,
              OccupancyDetector, EnvironmentalSensor, LightingLevelSensor,
              EnergyConsumptionSensor, BuildingBIMModel, DeviceMetadataStream
]

instance BOREALISReinforcementLearningEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains PredictiveOptimizationService, ControlPolicyUpdates,
              EnergyOptimizationRecommendations, CustomAnalyticsPlugin
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Facilitates **control signal propagation** from the DT to physical actuators via middleware (Eclipse Hono/Ditto), enabling automated adjustments to building systems (e.g., adaptive lighting, HVAC optimization). The framework automates runtime interface generation from BIM models to ensure seamless integration with legacy BCS systems, minimizing manual configuration."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Operates on a **real-time to near-real-time** scale, with synchronization rates aligned to operational needs (e.g., sensor refresh cycles of milliseconds to seconds for lighting control). The framework prioritizes **low-latency data exchange** to ensure responsive DT-to-physical interactions, particularly for critical control systems (e.g., adaptive lighting in BOREALIS)."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "A **centralized DT architecture** with a **service-oriented design**, where the DT is orchestrated as a unified system comprising:
  - A **core DT layer** (hosted on the DT framework) integrating BIM models, middleware, and visualization tools.
  - **Modular services** (e.g., lighting control, energy analytics) deployed via extension points, enabling scalability.
  - **Bidirectional communication** between the DT and physical building via Hono/Ditto, ensuring real-time synchronization across the constellation. The Living Lab case study demonstrates this as a **single DT instance** with potential sub-twins for specialized functions."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Covers the **entire building lifecycle**:
  1. **Design Phase**: BIM models are enriched with device metadata and control logic (e.g., lighting automation rules).
  2. **Construction Phase**: Physical devices are configured and integrated with the DT via middleware (Eclipse Hono/Ditto).
  3. **Operation Phase**: Real-time monitoring, adaptive control (e.g., BOREALIS reinforcement learning), and custom services are deployed. The DT evolves dynamically via runtime configuration management, enabling iterative improvements (e.g., energy optimization policies)."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Ensures **high fidelity** through:
  - **Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric**: Quantifies the alignment between the DT and physical building, validating real-time synchronization.
  - **Verification/Validation**: Automated checks during model transformation to detect semantic drift (e.g., mismatches between BIM and runtime data).
  - **Uncertainty Handling**: Assumes real-time data streams (e.g., sensor inputs) are processed with minimal latency to preserve fidelity.
  The framework emphasizes **dynamic synchronization** to mitigate drift between static BIM models and operational data."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Established via:
  - **Network Protocols**: Middleware (Eclipse Hono/Ditto) uses standardized protocols for data exchange (e.g., MQTT, WebSockets).
  - **Architecture**: A **layered system** with:
    1. **BIM-to-Runtime Interface Layer**: Transforms BIM models into runtime configurations.
    2. **Middleware Layer**: Handles real-time data streaming (Hono/Ditto).
    3. **Visualization Layer**: Unreal Engine for interactive DT visualization.
  The connection ensures **low-latency, bidirectional communication** between physical devices and the DT."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Deployed as a **scalable, cloud-native DT platform** with:
  - **Modular Hosting**: Extension points allow integration with existing IT infrastructures (e.g., cloud services, on-premise servers).
  - **Runtime Artifacts**: Generated automatically from BIM models (e.g., Hono/Ditto configurations) to reduce manual effort.
  - **Unreal Engine Integration**: Hosted within the DT framework for interactive visualization, ensuring seamless user experience."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Enables integration with:
  - **External Systems**: Other DTs or IoT platforms via standardized APIs (e.g., Hono/Ditto middleware).
  - **BIM Standards**: Adheres to AECO-specific standards (e.g., IFC, COBIE) to ensure interoperability with legacy systems.
  - **Stakeholder Collaboration**: Facilitates real-time data sharing among **Building Control Engineers**, **Facility Managers**, and **DT Engineers** via unified interfaces."
]

instance data_ownership_and_privacy : DTDFVocab:DataOwnershipPrivacy [
    base:desc "Not explicitly detailed in the documents, but the framework assumes:
  - **Data Ownership**: Primarily held by the **building owner/operator**, with DT services acting as intermediaries for processing.
  - **Privacy Compliance**: Middleware (Eclipse Hono/Ditto) likely adheres to **data protection regulations** (e.g., GDPR) for sensor data, though specifics are not provided."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Adheres to:
  - **AECO Standards**: BIM standards (e.g., IFC, COBIE) for semantic integration.
  - **Middleware Standards**: Eclipse Hono/Ditto for real-time data exchange.
  - **Model-Driven Engineering (MDE)**: Follows industry practices for automated transformations (e.g., model-to-model, model-to-text).
  The framework emphasizes **standardized extension points** to enable modular, interoperable DT development."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Addressed via:
  - **Cybersecurity**: Middleware (Hono/Ditto) likely includes authentication/authorization mechanisms to prevent unauthorized access to physical devices.
  - **Safety**: DT services are designed to operate **remotely** but with safeguards to avoid accidental harm (e.g., emergency shutdown protocols for critical systems).
  The framework prioritizes **secure, low-latency communication** to ensure reliable DT-to-physical interactions."
]
